title: Further More
description: A little mod that adds some vanilla friendly stuff
body:
Further More adds new vanilla friendly and funny features.
-
- Cat ears, can be enchanted with Softpaws to negate falldamage when sneaking but taking damage in water.
- Striped Socks, cozy socks.
- LGBTQ Socks, To show support to the LGBTQ communty you can wear these socks.
- Bear cookie, Just a cookie in the shape of a bear.
- Silverfosh Item, Silverfishes now drop them self, this can eaten giving you blindness and Nausea.
- Silverfish stew, made with silverfish it gives you blindness and resistance.
- Rose gold, can be used for making a block of rose gold, rose gold bars and rose gold rings.
- Wandering Template, traded by the wandering trader and can be duplicated, it can be used for making a merchants ring in a smithing table.
- Merchants ring, makes villagers like you more by giving you hero of the village when right-clicking.
- Inklight and Rose Inklight, A new light block made with glow ink.
- Slingshot, can shoot cobblestone, when it hits a player or mob it wil give large knockback, when hitting a block it will replace the block with cobblestone.
- Golden silverfish item, traded by the wandering trader, it is used for upgrading a slingshot to a golden slingshot in a smithing table.
- Golden slingshot, can shoot sliverfish, when hitting a player or mob it will give them blindness, when hitting a block it will summon a silverfish.
- Large Pine forest, a biome with tall striped dark oak pine trees.
- Trampoline, made with scaffolding and slime it will make you jump 16 blocks higher and negate falldamage when falling on it.
- Oak Forest, like the normal oak forest but with higher trees.
- Ground leaves, can be found on the ground of oak biomes and can be duplicated by breaking them.
- New paintings, Music Cave, Sharks, Heads, Illusion, Celeste, Adventure, Protect, Goddess, Robot Man, Watching, Pearl Villager, Leaves, Swim and Newly Hatched.
- Sugar Cube, Crafted with 9 sugar and acts like a gravity block.

_This mod will be updated a lot so if you have any suggestions you can send them in the discord._
